clauses.original_text:
1.1 The Licensor hereby grants Leave and Licence to the Licensee in respect of Flat No. 804, 8th Floor,
Tower A, Rustomjee Elements, Off New Link Road, Andheri (West), Mumbai — 400058,
admeasuring approximately 650 sq. ft. (carpet area), consisting of 1 Bedroom, 1 Hall, 1 Kitchen and 1
Bathroom (hereinafter referred to as the "Licensed Premises").
clauses.explanation: The licensor is giving the licensee permission to use the specified flat for a certain period.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 1 (ref: 1.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
1.2 The Licensed Premises is for residential purposes only. The Licensee shall not use or permit to be
used the Licensed Premises or any part thereof for any commercial, professional, or industrial purpose
whatsoever.
clauses.explanation: The licensee can only use the premises for residential purposes and not for any commercial or business activities.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 2 (ref: 1.2) of the document

clauses.original_text:
1.3 The Licensee acknowledges having inspected the Licensed Premises prior to execution of this
Agreement and having found the same in good and tenantable condition. A list of fixtures, fittings, and
furniture handed over to the Licensee is annexed hereto as Schedule I.
2. TERM AND DURATION
clauses.explanation: The licensee has inspected the premises and found it to be in good condition. A list of fixtures and furniture is attached to the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 3 (ref: 1.3) of the document

clauses.original_text:
2.1 This Agreement shall be effective for a period of Eleven (11) months commencing from 1st July
2026 and expiring on 31st May 2027 (hereinafter referred to as the "Licence Period"), unless earlier
terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof.
clauses.explanation: The agreement is valid for 11 months, starting from July 1st, 2026, and ending on May 31st, 2027.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 4 (ref: 2.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
2.2 Renewal: Upon expiry of the Licence Period, this Agreement may be renewed for a further period by
mutual written consent of both parties. Renewal shall not be automatic. Silence or continued occupation
beyond the Licence Period shall not constitute tacit renewal and shall be treated as unauthorised
occupation subject to applicable law.
clauses.explanation: The agreement can be renewed after it expires, but both parties must agree in writing. If not renewed, the licensee must vacate the premises.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 5 (ref: 2.2) of the document

clauses.original_text:
2.3 Holdover Penalty: In the event the Licensee continues to occupy the Licensed Premises beyond the
expiry of the Licence Period without execution of a renewal agreement, the Licensee shall be liable to pay
the Licensor a holdover compensation at twice (2x) the prevailing monthly licence fee for each month or
part thereof of such holdover, without prejudice to the Licensor's right to institute eviction proceedings.
3. LICENCE FEE AND PAYMENT TERMS
--- PAGE 2 ---
clauses.explanation: If the licensee stays in the premises after the agreement expires without renewing, they must pay double the monthly fee as a penalty.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 6 (ref: 2.3) of the document

clauses.original_text:
3.1 Monthly Licence Fee: The Licensee shall pay the Licensor a monthly licence fee of Rs. 32,000/-
(Rupees Thirty-Two Thousand only), payable in advance on or before the 5th day of each English
calendar month.
clauses.explanation: The licensee must pay a monthly fee of Rs. 32,000 in advance, by the 5th of each month.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 7 (ref: 3.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
3.2 Mode of Payment: All payments shall be made via NEFT/IMPS/UPI to the Licensor's bank account:
A/c No. 004201087642, HDFC Bank, Andheri Branch, IFSC: HDFC0000042. Cash payments shall not
be accepted.
clauses.explanation: The licensee must pay the fee through online banking to the licensor's account, and cash payments are not allowed.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 8 (ref: 3.2) of the document

clauses.original_text:
3.3 Late Payment Penalty: In the event of delay beyond the 5th of any month, the Licensee shall pay a
late payment charge of Rs. 500/- per day of delay, which shall be added to the next month's licence fee.
Sustained delay beyond 15 days shall be treated as a material breach under Clause 9.2.
clauses.explanation: If the licensee pays late, they must pay a penalty of Rs. 500 per day, and if the delay is more than 15 days, it's considered a serious breach.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 9 (ref: 3.3) of the document

clauses.original_text:
3.4 Annual Escalation: The monthly licence fee shall stand escalated by 5% (five percent) on each
anniversary of the commencement date during any renewal term. No escalation applies during the initial
11-month Licence Period.
4. SECURITY DEPOSIT
clauses.explanation: The monthly fee will increase by 5% every year on the anniversary of the start date, but only after the initial 11 months.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 10 (ref: 3.4) of the document

clauses.original_text:
4.1 The Licensee has, on or before the execution of this Agreement, paid to the Licensor an interest-free
refundable security deposit of Rs. 1,60,000/- (Rupees One Lakh Sixty Thousand only), equivalent to
five (5) months' licence fee (hereinafter referred to as the "Security Deposit"). Receipt of the same is
hereby acknowledged by the Licensor.
clauses.explanation: The licensee has paid a refundable security deposit of Rs. 1,60,000, which is equal to 5 months' fee.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 11 (ref: 4.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
4.2 The Security Deposit shall be refunded to the Licensee within 30 (thirty) days of the Licensee
vacating the Licensed Premises and handing over vacant possession thereof, subject to deduction of:
(a) any outstanding licence fee or other dues payable by the Licensee; (b) the cost of repair of any
damage to the Licensed Premises or its fixtures beyond fair wear and tear; and (c) any penalty amounts
accrued under this Agreement.
clauses.explanation: The security deposit will be refunded within 30 days of the licensee vacating the premises, after deducting any outstanding fees, damages, or penalties.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 12 (ref: 4.2) of the document

clauses.clause_title: Security Deposit Not Applicable to Licence Fee
clauses.original_text:
4.3 The Security Deposit shall not be appropriated by the Licensee towards licence fee for the last
month(s) of the Licence Period. Any attempt to do so shall be treated as a default under Clause 9.2.
5. MAINTENANCE AND UTILITIES
clauses.explanation: The security deposit cannot be used to pay the licence fee for the last month, and trying to do so is considered a default.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 13 (ref: 4.3) of the document

clauses.original_text:
5.1 Society Maintenance Charges: The monthly society maintenance charges currently assessed at
Rs. 3,200/- per month shall be borne exclusively by the Licensor. Any increase in maintenance charges
levied by the co-operative housing society during the Licence Period shall likewise be borne by the
Licensor.
clauses.explanation: The licensor is responsible for paying the monthly society maintenance charges, which are currently Rs. 3,200.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 14 (ref: 5.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
5.2 Electricity and Water: The Licensee shall bear all charges for electricity consumed at the Licensed
Premises as per BEST/Adani Electricity meter readings, and any water charges levied directly on the
premises. The electricity connection is in the Licensor's name; the Licensee shall not apply for a change
of name on the meter.
clauses.explanation: The licensee is responsible for paying for electricity and water used in the premises, and the electricity connection is in the licensor's name.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 15 (ref: 5.2) of the document

clauses.original_text:
5.3 Broadband and Cable: Installation of any broadband internet or cable TV connection by the
Licensee shall require prior written approval from the Licensor and shall comply with the housing society's
bye-laws. The Licensee shall bear all such connection and monthly charges.
6. OBLIGATIONS OF THE LICENSEE
clauses.explanation: The licensee needs the licensor's approval to install broadband or cable TV, and must follow the housing society's rules and pay the charges.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 16 (ref: 5.3) of the document

clauses.original_text:
6.1 The Licensee shall: (a) use the Licensed Premises solely for residential purposes; (b) maintain the
Licensed Premises in clean and good condition; (c) not make any structural alterations, additions, or
permanent fixtures without prior written consent of the Licensor; (d) not sublet, assign, or part with
--- PAGE 3 ---
possession of the Licensed Premises or any part thereof to any third party; (e) not store or use any
hazardous, flammable, or illegal substances on the Licensed Premises; (f) comply with all rules and
bye-laws of the co-operative housing society; and (g) allow the Licensor or his authorised representative
to inspect the Licensed Premises on giving 48 hours' prior notice.
clauses.explanation: The licensee must use the premises only for residential purposes, keep it clean, not make any changes without permission, and follow the housing society's rules.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 17 (ref: 6.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
6.2 Pet Policy: Keeping of pets is not permitted on the Licensed Premises without the prior written
consent of the Licensor, which may be granted or withheld at the Licensor's sole discretion.
7. OBLIGATIONS OF THE LICENSOR
clauses.explanation: The licensee is not allowed to keep pets in the premises without the licensor's prior written permission.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 18 (ref: 6.2) of the document

clauses.original_text:
7.1 The Licensor shall: (a) ensure that the Licensed Premises is handed over to the Licensee in a
habitable condition; (b) attend to and bear costs of any major structural or plumbing repairs not
attributable to the Licensee's acts or omissions; (c) not interfere with the Licensee's peaceful use and
enjoyment of the Licensed Premises during the Licence Period; and (d) ensure timely payment of all
property taxes and society maintenance charges.
8. LOCK-IN PERIOD
clauses.explanation: The licensor must hand over the premises in good condition, fix any major repairs, not disturb the licensee, and pay property taxes and maintenance charges.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 19 (ref: 7.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
8.1 There shall be a mandatory lock-in period of 3 (three) months from the commencement date of this
Agreement during which neither party may terminate this Agreement except in the case of a material
breach under Clause 9.2. If the Licensee vacates the Licensed Premises during the lock-in period, the
Licensor shall be entitled to forfeit the Security Deposit to the extent of unpaid licence fee for the
unexpired lock-in period.
9. TERMINATION
clauses.explanation: There is a 3-month lock-in period where neither party can terminate the agreement, except in case of a serious breach. If the licensee leaves during this period, the licensor can keep the security deposit.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 20 (ref: 8.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
9.1 Termination by Notice: Either party may terminate this Agreement after the lock-in period by giving
the other party not less than 30 (thirty) days' prior written notice delivered by registered post or email
with read receipt to the addresses specified herein.
clauses.explanation: After the lock-in period, either party can terminate the agreement by giving 30 days' written notice.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 21 (ref: 9.1) of the document

clauses.original_text:
9.2 Termination for Material Breach: The Licensor may terminate this Agreement forthwith (without any
notice period) upon: (a) non-payment of licence fee for more than 15 consecutive days; (b) subletting or
assignment without consent; (c) use of the Licensed Premises for any illegal purpose; or (d) causing wilful
damage to the Licensed Premises exceeding Rs. 20,000/-. Upon such termination, the Licensor may
forfeit the Security Deposit.
clauses.explanation: The licensor can terminate the agreement immediately if the licensee doesn't pay the fee for more than 15 days, sublets without permission, uses the premises for illegal activities, or causes significant damage.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on Segment 22 (ref: 9.2) of the document

clauses.clause_title: Vacation and Handover: Upon termination or expiry of this Agreement, the Licensee shall vacate
clauses.original_text:
9.3 Vacation and Handover: Upon termination or expiry of this Agreement, the Licensee shall vacate
and hand over the Licensed Premises to the Licensor in the same condition as received, subject to fair
wear and tear, along with all keys, access cards, and parking tokens.
10. INDEMNIFICATION
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 9.3 of the document.

clauses.clause_title: The Licensee shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Licensor from and against any loss,
clauses.original_text:
10.1 The Licensee shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Licensor from and against any loss,
damage, liability, claim, or expense (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or resulting from: (a)
the Licensee's breach of any provision of this Agreement; (b) any act, omission, or negligence of the
Licensee, the Licensee's family members, servants, or guests; or (c) the Licensee's failure to comply with
any applicable law, rule, or society bye-law.
11. DISPUTE RESOLUTION AND JURISDICTION
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 10.1 of the document.

clauses.clause_title: Governing Law: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws
clauses.original_text:
11.1 Governing Law: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws
of India, and in particular the Maharashtra Rent Control Act, 1999, and the Indian Contract Act, 1872.
--- PAGE 4 ---
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 11.1 of the document.

clauses.clause_title: Jurisdiction: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be subject to...
clauses.original_text:
11.2 Jurisdiction: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be subject to the
exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 11.2 of the document.

clauses.clause_title: Arbitration: Notwithstanding Clause 11.2, either party may elect to resolve any dispute through
clauses.original_text:
11.3 Arbitration: Notwithstanding Clause 11.2, either party may elect to resolve any dispute through
arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996, with a sole arbitrator mutually appointed by
both parties. The seat of arbitration shall be Mumbai.
12. REGISTRATION AND STAMP DUTY
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 11.3 of the document.

clauses.clause_title: This Agreement shall be duly registered under the Registration Act, 1908, and stamped in
clauses.original_text:
12.1 This Agreement shall be duly registered under the Registration Act, 1908, and stamped in
accordance with the Maharashtra Stamp Act. The stamp duty and registration charges shall be borne
equally by the Licensor and the Licensee.
13. NOTICES
All notices under this Agreement shall be in writing and delivered to the addresses stated on Page 1
hereof, or such other address as a party may notify in writing. Notices sent by registered post or email
with confirmed delivery shall be deemed received within 48 hours of dispatch.
14. ENTIRE AGREEMENT
This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter
hereof and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, warranties, and understandings of the
parties.
SIGNATURES
___________________________

LICENSEE
Mr. Suresh Ramakrishnan Iyer
Date: ____________
Ms. Priya Nair
Date: ____________
WITNESSES:
1. ___________________________ Name: ________________ Address: ________________________________
2. ___________________________ Name: ________________ Address: ________________________________
clauses.explanation: This clause is part of the agreement.
clauses.grounding_statement: This is based on section 12.1 of the document.
